title: Romantic Fermented Dense Syrian Passion Fruit Stir-fry
description: A diabetic-friendly romantic Syrian dish featuring fermented passion fruit pulp combined with aromatic spices for a dense and flavorful meal.
instructions: Heat turmeric oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add cumin powder and cardamom powder, cook until fragrant (about 30 seconds).
Stir in ginger paste and mix well for about 1 minute to avoid burning.
Gradually add fermented passion fruit pulp while continuously stirring; cook for another 2-3 minutes until the mixture thickens slightly.

Pour in lemon juice, stir evenly. Reduce heat to low if needed, allowing it to simmer gently for an additional 5-7 minutes or until all flavors are well combined and the consistency is as desired (dense and flavorful).
Garnish with a few passion fruit seeds for a pop of color and texture.
Serve hot or at room temperature. Optional: Serve alongside crusty bread for added texture.
